xBRIEFInfo.author: agent:cursor
xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF for deploying chord loop mode + Bell clock-sync default to Fly.io

plan.title: Deploy chord loop mode + Bell clock-sync default to Fly.io

narratives.Overview: Deploy current main (commit c79f72a) to Fly.io so two merged features reach production: the continuous BPM-driven chord loop mode (PR #123) and the Bell meditation voice defaulting to clock-synced every 30 minutes (PR #122). Deploy-only using the existing fly.toml / Dockerfile; no code changes.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Deploy main@c79f72a to Fly.io via the Fly CLI using the existing config. FR-2: Do not commit/push/modify source; deploy-only. FR-3: Verify the app is live (HTTP 200 on root URL); report app name, URL, release version, machine health. NFR-1: On non-transient failure (auth, unrecoverable build/config), stop and report rather than making risky changes.
narratives.Assumptions: A-1: Fly CLI installed + authenticated. A-2: fly.toml/Dockerfile correct from prior deploys (release 43 last shipped). A-3: Remote build acceptable.

items.title: Run fly deploy for main@c79f72a and verify the live app returns HTTP 200
